CONTACTID.TEXT: Hello Officer, what can i do for you?
Hi, thanks for the response. It appears to be a Hit and Run.
How do you know this?
I briefly talked to the victim. But there is maybe witness. Talk to the Woman in front the Liquor store.
Sure. I will try to find out more about the accident.
That is all I have for you!
Hello Miss. I'm officer {0} from the {1}. Do you know anything about the accident?
Yes, officer I do. I'm the owner of this store, I ran out as I saw a car ran over this guy!
Can you tell me how this happened?
~w~ was driving down Joshua road when it suddenly came on the sidewalk and hit the guy!
Well did you maybe see the vehicle's license plate?
It all went very fast, so I only remember the last 3 digits. They are ~y~
That is more then enough. It will definitely help to find out the driver. You can leave now.
Thank you officer.
Sorry, but that's all I can tell you.
Hey, how i can assist?
Oh hi {0}. I thought you are on vacation?
Well, someone got sick so i canceled it. What happened here?
Sad to hear. The Visitor here got hit by car. The cook of this place can tell you more.
Okay. I will ask him.
That is all I have for you!
Hello Sir. My name is {0} from the {1}. Can you tell me what happened?
Sure, officer {0}. I saw the accident and called 9-1-1.
Thanks. So what happened to your visitor?
~w~ just ran him over. The car came out this parking place.
Do you have surveillance cameras to maybe get the license plate?
Yes, but they are not working. But I remember the last 3 digits of the car. It was ~y~
Please fix your cameras. I would make my job easier, but at least we have 3 numbers. That's all thanks
I will do so officer.
Sorry, but that's all I can tell you.
Hello. Whats going on?
Hi. I just arrived a minute ago, so i can't tell.
Okay. Have you spoken to anybody?
I just wanted to do that. But now you are here. So can you take over?
Sure i will do so. Maybe make some notes about the scene.
I'm writing down some notes about the scene!
Hello Sir. I'm from the {0}. Did you see how this man got hurt?
Hello officer! Yes i did. I called 9-1-1 form the phone booth.
Okay. Then please describe how this happened
~w~ came from the petrol pump. The guy crossed the exit and the car ran over him. It didn't stop. I immediately left the place
Can you remember the vehicle's license plate?
Damn no. Maybe the last 3 digits. They could be ~y~
Okay. I will try to run this in our system. Maybe we get a hit. Thanks for your cooperation.
No problem, anytime.
Sorry, but that's all I can tell you.
Hey Ranger. What can i do for you?
Hello officer, thanks for responding. I was coming back to the station when i found them here.
Do you know what happened?
To be honest, i didn't ask. Its your jurisdiction and i was busy getting EMS here and providing first aid.
Fair enough. I will ask the man some questions.
That is all I have for you!
Hey Sir. My name is {0}. Can you tell what happened?
Hi officer. I'm glad that the ranger came bye and called the EMS.
Okay. Please focus on my questions. What happened?
~w~ was driving crazy down here. We wanted to go for a hike and then it suddenly appeared and hit my girl!
Did you see the vehicle's license plate?
I tried to. But in only saw the last 3 digits. It was ~y~
Thanks for that. For now thats enough. Maybe {0} will contact you later.
Okay. Thank you officer.
Sorry, but that's all I can tell you.
Hey buddy. What happened here?
Hi. Appears to be a Hit and Run. Paramedics told me that.
Do we have a witness?
Yeah, its the gas station owner. He told the paramedics that i was a Hit and Run.
Okay then i will ask him.
That is all I have for you!
Hey Sir. Are you the one that called the police.
No officer, it was one of my customers. But he already left.
Thats not good. Did you maybe saw what happened?
~w~ left the gas station and hit the man. I didn't see it, but i was told!
Hmm. Did the customer see a license plate?
No. But I did see the last 3 digits. They are ~y~
Okay that's good. Thanks for your help. Please give this officer a statement for the record.
Will do.
Sorry, but that's all I can tell you.
